title: adamanthus exaltatus
intro: Adamanthus exaltatus, also known as 'Mountain Tea' or 'Jacob's Ladder', is a flowering plant species in the family Polemoniaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Adamanthus exaltatus are said to include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Adamanthus exaltatus can be consumed as a tea or dried as a supplement, often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
